summary: Ride-sharing/trip management app with driver and customer flows, admin role management, and trip filtering UI. Currently implementing backend-only admin role recovery: stable admin principals set seeded with two specified principals, isAdmin() check, and getMyRole() returning #admin for admin callers.
architectural_notes: Admin principals are stored in a stable set seeded with two hardcoded principal IDs; isAdmin() checks this set; getMyRole() returns #admin if isAdmin(caller) is true

new_feature_requests.summary: Backend-only admin role recovery: seed stable admin principals set with two specified principals, fix isAdmin() and getMyRole() to return #admin for admin callers

Replace the current admin principals set in backend/main.mo with a stable set seeded with BOTH of the following principals: '6ngnc-ph7ou-g23nw-z2zbr-czprs-ohpe6-2wolp-eeo7o-c32lo-deiso-yqe' and 'g3c77-j7yp6-ydsrd-2zp2q-vajyd-4ymec-tydvo-kcxwl-s7reg-37yws-eae'. The set must be declared as a stable variable so it persists across upgrades.
Update the isAdmin(caller) function in backend/main.mo to return true if and only if the caller's principal is present in the stable admin principals set.
Update the getMyRole() function in backend/main.mo so that if isAdmin(caller) is true, it returns #admin regardless of the stored user role. Otherwise, it returns the stored user role as before.
